component.name: SONE
component.summary: Native Linux client for TIDAL — lossless and bit-perfect audio streaming

description.p: Stream your TIDAL library in lossless FLAC and Hi-Res quality up to 24-bit/192kHz — with the option to bypass your system mixer entirely for bit-perfect output.

A familiar, modern interface inspired by the streaming apps you already use. Exclusive ALSA mode bypasses PulseAudio and PipeWire entirely, sending the unaltered signal directly to your DAC for bit-perfect playback. Or use normal mode for casual listening through your system's default output.

ul.li: Lossless FLAC and Hi-Res streaming up to 24-bit/192kHz
Exclusive ALSA output for bit-perfect streaming to USB DACs
Volume normalization (ReplayGain) with automatic album/track switching
Custom themes with full color picker
MPRIS media controls and system tray

description.p: Unofficial client — requires an active TIDAL subscription. SONE is a streaming client only and does not support offline downloads.

screenshot.caption: Now playing drawer with synced lyrics
Home page with TIDAL streaming library
Custom theme with full color customization

ul.li: Scrobble your listening history to Last.fm, Libre.fm, and ListenBrainz — complete with ISRC and MusicBrainz metadata
Toggle window decorations to switch between native and custom title bar
Repeat and shuffle now work correctly — wrap-around, repeat-one, and shuffle-aware playback all fixed
Fixed rapid track skipping causing the UI to freeze
User menu reorganized into clean, grouped sections
